Game.Name: Super Formation Soccer (Japan)
Game.plot: Super Soccer is a Sports game, developed and published by Human Entertainment,which was released in Japan in 1991.Cheat: CodesAt Title Screen, choose ''Tournament'', then ''Continue'', then enter these directional pad codes: Cheat: Play as RomaniaUse these passwords to play as Romania in the TournamentCheat: Play as RomaniaUse these passwords to play as Yugoslavia in the TournamentCheat: Play as RomaniaThe password screen is found by choosing 'Continue' on the main screen.Cheat: Play as RomaniaAt the Title Screen select Tournament, then Continue.Cheat: No Red CardsWhen the referee takes out a red card keep holding L and R and the game will act as if he gave you a yellow card.Cheat: Give the opponent a red card.When the referee is approaching you to give you a yeallow card, hold L and R. He will still warn your player, but he'll also hand out a red card to the opponent you fouled.
